properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Foursquare we stand for the living word For the word of God Telling to all the story of Jesus, stem of Jesse’s rod Man of sorrow and of grief, dying on the tree Mighty Redeemer, glorious Savior Jesus of Calvary

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Preach the Foursquare Gospel The Foursquare Gospel Clear let the Foursquare message ring (Let it ring) Jesus only Savior, Baptizer and Healer Jesus the coming King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Unfurl your banners and forward go Oh ye ransomed host Trusting in Jesus Mighty Baptizer With the Holy Ghost Lion of Judah, King of kings, Lord of lords is He Clothing HIs church with power to witness Leading to victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Catch up your shield oh ye living Church Christ of Galilee Bore all our sickness, carried our sorrows Set the prisoners free Lift the fallen, help the faith, dry the weeping eyes Come bring your sickness to thy physician, for He is passing by.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lift your eyes, then unto the hills Lift your voice and sing The cloud of heavens aflame with glory greet the coming king Swift as wings of eagle’s flight shall He come again
